title: PokéAPI Resources, URL API, Pagination Shapes, and Fair-Use Policy · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Fixed Destination
summary: User input becomes a full fetch destination, URL strings are concatenated, pagination fields are assumed present, and repeated commands bypass the API request to cache every resource. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts fixed destination increment in fixed-origin typed PokéAPI request policy. Learners progress through predict…
objectives: Hold scheme and authority in trusted configuration and map commands only to enumerated PokéAPI resource paths.
Test ordering, empty and unknown fields, Unicode, control characters, no-color mode, narrow width, and stdout or stderr routing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
